title: Rekindled CTM
description: Add-on pack for Fire Rekindled, to be used with CTM mods
body:
![Header](https://imgur.com/kmETiT4.gif)

This is an Addon Pack for [Fire Rekindled](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fire-rekindled), providing connected textures for Fire and Soul Fire, as well as Honey and Slime Blocks.

(Also adds overhangs to Moss Carpets for good measure)

The pack is under development and may affect more textures in the future.


**!!This pack requires Continuity or Optifine to work!!**


If you're using Sodium and find that some textures get desynced and don't line up with their neighbours anymore, try disabling "Animate Only Visible Textures" in the video settings.

![Sodium setting](https://imgur.com/TGQsNTK.png)

Connected Slime and Honey have moved to [Viscous CTM](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/viscous-ctm)

Follow the (admittedly slow) development on [Discord](https://discord.gg/tw5SJxqC) if you like
